wdegp_utils

Functions

differences_by_dim_func(X1, X2, n_order[, index])

rbf_kernel(differences, length_scales, n_order, ...[, ...])

determine_weights(diffs_by_dim, diffs_test, ...)

ARD RBF kernel for multi-dimensional inputs:

Module Contents

wdegp_utils.differences_by_dim_func(X1, X2, n_order, index=-1)[source]
wdegp_utils.rbf_kernel(differences, length_scales, n_order, n_bases, kernel_func, der_indices, powers, index=-1)[source]
wdegp_utils.determine_weights(diffs_by_dim, diffs_test, length_scales, kernel_func)[source]
ARD RBF kernel for multi-dimensional inputs:

k(x, x’) = sigma_f^2 * exp( -0.5 * sum_{d}((x_d - x’_d)^2 / ell_d^2) ).

Parameters:

  • X1 (array of shape (N, D))

  • X2 (array of shape (M, D))

  • length_scales (array of shape (D,), each dimension's length scale)

  • sigma_f (float (signal amplitude))

Returns:

K

Return type:

array of shape (N, M)
